name: Portabella Mushroom Risotto
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
Heat butter in a small skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms and saute 3-5 minutes or until soft. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Reserve.
Simmer the stock in a saucepan.
Heat butter and oil in a 4-quart casserole over medium heat. Add onion and saute 1-2 minutes. Do not brown.
Add the rice to the soffrito, stirring to coat all grains. Add the wine, stirring until completely absorbed.
Gradually add the simmering broth 1/2 cup at a time, stirring frequently. Wait for each portion to be absorbed before adding the next.
After approximately 20 minutes, when the rice is tender but still firm, add the reserved broth, mushrooms, cream, Parmesan, and parsley. Stir until the cheese is melted. Serve immediately.
